tasks.name: commit-message-linter
args: grep -qE '^(build|chore|ci|docs|feat|fix|perf|refactor|revert|style|test)(\([^)]+\))?!?: .{1,}' "$1" || { echo 'Commit message must follow Conventional Commits: <type>(<scope>)?: <subject>'; exit 1; }

if (-not ((Get-Content $args[0] -Raw) -match '^(build|chore|ci|docs|feat|fix|perf|refactor|revert|style|test)(\([^)]+\))?!?: .{1,}')) { Write-Host 'Commit message must follow Conventional Commits: <type>(<scope>)?: <subject>'; exit 1 }
